revenue_recognition.method: ASC 606. CFF recognized as underlying franchisee sales occur. IFF deferred and amortized over 12 years. Ad Fund recognized when underlying sales occur.

depreciation.method: Straight-line. Transportation 5-20 yr, Computer 3-5 yr, Leasehold improvements 5-10 yr, Equipment 3-7 yr.

impairment.policy: Review when events indicate non-recoverability. No triggering events 2022-2024.

goodwill.method: Private company alternative (ASU 2014-02). Straight-line over 10 years. Entity-level testing. Fully amortized 2024.

advertising_fund.policy: 5% of franchisee sales collected. Restricted cash held separately. Admin fee paid to GC (5% of Ad Fund receipts).

deferred_franchise_fees.policy: IFF deferred upon collection, amortized over 12 years. Total unearned: $21.2M at 12/31/2024.

parent_affiliate_structure.note: Board members and immediate family own/operate 23 GREAT CLIPS salons
